title: Remove Environmental  Fog (Water, Lava, Nether)
description: Removes environmental fogs (Water, Lava, Nether) in 1.21.6+
body:
This resourcepack removes environmental fog, which many players find annoying. This includes in water, lava and the nether fog.

This resourcepack only works in 1.21.6+ as mojang changed the vanila fog shader, breaking many of fog resource packs prior to 1.21.6 including the popular resource pack https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-lava,-water,-or-fog-overlay-1.21-by-silvermanmc.
